title: 11 Herbal Creams For Jaw Clenching
description: Achillea millefolium creams contains active constituents like sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and triterpenoids. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help relax the muscles in the jaw. The sesquiterpenes, specifically, have been shown to reduce inflammation and ease muscle tension. The flavonoids and triterpenoids in the cream may also help to calm the nervous system, which can contribute to jaw clenching. By applying Achillea millefolium cream to ...
